/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/abi_information.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/assembly/x86/x86_assembler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/assembly/x86/x86_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/assembly/x86/x86_pre_allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/entry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/ir/basic_register_allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/ir/ir_control_flow_graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/ir/ir_operand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/ir/ir_operation_block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/jit/growing_jit_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/jit/jit_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/jit/jit_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/testing/ir_emulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/testing/test_cases.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rem.dir/src/testing/test_enviroment.cpp.o -o rem
